SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.common

Class Result<T,E extends Throwable>

java.lang.Object
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.common.Result<T,E>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the value in a successful result
E - the type of the error in a failed result
Direct Known Subclasses:
Result.Failure, Result.Success
public abstract sealed class Result<T,E extends Throwable> extends Object permits Result.Success<T,E>, Result.Failure<T,E>
Represents a result of an operation that can either succeed with a value of type T or fail with an error of type E.

This class is a sealed abstract class that defines two concrete subclasses: Result.Success for successful results and Result.Failure for failed results.

It provides methods to handle both success and failure cases, allowing for functional-style programming patterns such as mapping, flat-mapping, and recovering from errors.

The class also provides utility methods to create instances of Result.Success and Result.Failure, as well as methods to convert the result into an Optional or a Stream.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    Result.Failure<T,E extends Throwable>
    Represents a failed result containing an error of type E.
    static final class 
    Result.Success<T,E extends Throwable>
    Represents a successful result containing a value of type T.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final boolean
    equals(@Nullable Object object)
     
    static <T, E extends Throwable>
    Result.Failure<T,E>
    failure(E error)
    Creates a new Result instance representing a failed result with the given error.
    final <U> Result<U,? super E>
    flatMap(Function<? super T,? extends Result<U,? super E>> mapper)
    Applies a mapping function to the value of this result if it is successful, returning a new result with the mapped value.
    final T
    get()
    Returns the value of this result if it is successful, or throws an exception if it is a failure.
    final int
    hashCode()
     
    final void
    ifFailed(Consumer<? super E> action)
    Executes the given action if this result is a failure, passing the error to the action.
    final void
    ifSuccessful(Consumer<? super T> action)
    Executes the given action if this result is a success, passing the value to the action.
    final void
    ifSuccessfulOrElse(Consumer<? super T> successAction, Consumer<? super E> failureAction)
    Executes the given actions based on whether this result is a success or a failure.
    final <U> Result<U,E>
    map(Function<T,U> mapper)
    Maps the value of this result to a new result using the given mapping function if this result is a success.
    final <X extends Throwable>
    Result<? super T,X>
    or(Function<? super E,? extends Result<? super T,X>> recovery)
    Maps the value of this result to a new result using the given mapping function if this result is a success.
    final T
    orElse(T other)
    Returns the value of this result if it is a success, or the given default value if it is a failure.
    final T
    orElseGet(Function<E,T> mapper)
    Returns the value of this result if it is a success, or applies the given mapping function to the error and returns the result.
    final T
    orElseThrow()
    Returns the value of this result if it is a success, or throws the error if it is a failure.
    final <X extends Throwable>
    T
    orElseThrow(Function<E,X> mapper)
    Returns the value of this result if it is a success, or throws an exception created by the given mapping function if it is a failure.
    final Stream<T>
    stream()
    Converts this result into a Stream containing the value if this result is a success, or an empty stream if this result is a failure.
    static <T, E extends Throwable>
    Result.Success<T,E>
    success(T value)
    Creates a new Result instance representing a successful result with the given value.
    final Optional<@NotNull T>
    toOptional()
    Converts this result into an Optional containing the value if this result is a success, or an empty Optional if this result is a failure.
    final String
    toString()
     
    static <T> Result<T,? extends RuntimeException>
    wrap(Supplier<T> supplier)
    Wraps a supplier in a Result, returning a successful result if the supplier executes without throwing an exception, or a failed result if an exception is thrown.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, finalize, getClass, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • failure

      public static <T, E extends Throwable> Result.Failure<T,E> failure(E error)
      Creates a new Result instance representing a failed result with the given error.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value in the successful result
      E - the type of the error in the failed result
      Parameters:
      error - the error of the failed result
      Returns:
      a new Result.Failure instance containing the given error

    • success

      public static <T, E extends Throwable> Result.Success<T,E> success(T value)
      Creates a new Result instance representing a successful result with the given value.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value in the successful result
      E - the type of the error in the failed result
      Parameters:
      value - the value of the successful result
      Returns:
      a new Result.Success instance containing the given value

    • wrap

      public static <T> Result<T,? extends RuntimeException> wrap(Supplier<T> supplier)
      Wraps a supplier in a Result, returning a successful result if the supplier executes without throwing an exception, or a failed result if an exception is thrown.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value returned by the supplier
      Parameters:
      supplier - the supplier to wrap
      Returns:
      a Result containing either the value from the supplier or the exception thrown by the supplier

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(@Nullable Object object)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • flatMap

      public final <U> Result<U,? super E> flatMap(Function<? super T,? extends Result<U,? super E>> mapper)
      Applies a mapping function to the value of this result if it is successful, returning a new result with the mapped value. If this result is a failure, it returns the same failure.
      Type Parameters:
      U - the type of the value in the resulting successful result
      Parameters:
      mapper - the function to apply to the value of this result if it is successful
      Returns:
      a new Result containing the mapped value if this result is successful, or the same failure if this result is a failure

    • get

      public final T get()
      Returns the value of this result if it is successful, or throws an exception if it is a failure.
      Returns:
      the value of this result if it is successful
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if this result is a failure

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • ifFailed

      public final void ifFailed(Consumer<? super E> action)
      Executes the given action if this result is a failure, passing the error to the action.
      Parameters:
      action - the action to execute if this result is a failure

    • ifSuccessful

      public final void ifSuccessful(Consumer<? super T> action)
      Executes the given action if this result is a success, passing the value to the action.
      Parameters:
      action - the action to execute if this result is a success

    • ifSuccessfulOrElse

      public final void ifSuccessfulOrElse(Consumer<? super T> successAction, Consumer<? super E> failureAction)
      Executes the given actions based on whether this result is a success or a failure.

      If this result is a success, the successAction is executed with the value of this result. If this result is a failure, the failureAction is executed with the error of this result.

      Parameters:
      successAction - the action to execute if this result is a success
      failureAction - the action to execute if this result is a failure

    • map

      public final <U> Result<U,E> map(Function<T,U> mapper)
      Maps the value of this result to a new result using the given mapping function if this result is a success. If this result is a failure, it returns the same failure.
      Type Parameters:
      U - the type of the value in the resulting successful result
      Parameters:
      mapper - the function to apply to the value of this result if it is a success
      Returns:
      a new Result containing the mapped value if this result is successful, or the same failure if this result is a failure

    • or

      public final <X extends Throwable> Result<? super T,X> or(Function<? super E,? extends Result<? super T,X>> recovery)
      Maps the value of this result to a new result using the given mapping function if this result is a success. If this result is a failure, it returns a new result created by applying the recovery function to the error.
      Type Parameters:
      X - the type of the error in the resulting failed result
      Parameters:
      recovery - the function to apply to the error of this result if it is a failure
      Returns:
      a new Result containing the mapped value if this result is successful, or a new failure if this result is a failure

    • orElse

      public final T orElse(T other)
      Returns the value of this result if it is a success, or the given default value if it is a failure.

      This method is useful for providing a fallback value when the operation represented by this result fails.

      If this result is a success, the value is returned. If this result is a failure, the provided default value is returned instead.

      Parameters:
      other - the default value to return if this result is a failure
      Returns:
      the value of this result if it is a success, or the provided default value if it is a failure

    • orElseGet

      public final T orElseGet(Function<E,T> mapper)
      Returns the value of this result if it is a success, or applies the given mapping function to the error and returns the result.

      This method is useful for providing a fallback value based on the error when the operation represented by this result fails.

      Parameters:
      mapper - the function to apply to the error if this result is a failure
      Returns:
      the value of this result if it is a success, or the result of applying the mapping function to the error if it is a failure

    • orElseThrow

      public final T orElseThrow() throws E
      Returns the value of this result if it is a success, or throws the error if it is a failure.

      This method is useful for propagating errors when the operation represented by this result fails.

      Returns:
      the value of this result if it is a success
      Throws:
      E - the error if this result is a failure

    • orElseThrow

      public final <X extends Throwable> T orElseThrow(Function<E,X> mapper) throws X
      Returns the value of this result if it is a success, or throws an exception created by the given mapping function if it is a failure.

      This method is useful for propagating errors with a custom exception type when the operation represented by this result fails.

      Type Parameters:
      X - the type of the exception to throw if this result is a failure
      Parameters:
      mapper - the function to apply to the error to create an exception if this result is a failure
      Returns:
      the value of this result if it is a success
      Throws:
      X - the exception created by applying the mapping function to the error if this result is a failure

    • toOptional

      public final Optional<@NotNull T> toOptional()
      Converts this result into an Optional containing the value if this result is a success, or an empty Optional if this result is a failure.

      This method is useful for integrating with APIs that expect an Optional type.

      Returns:
      an Optional containing the value if this result is a success, or an empty Optional if this result is a failure

    • stream

      public final Stream<T> stream()
      Converts this result into a Stream containing the value if this result is a success, or an empty stream if this result is a failure.

      This method is useful for integrating with APIs that expect a Stream type.

      Returns:
      a Stream containing the value if this result is a success, or an empty stream if this result is a failure

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
